Home Auction properties

Auction Properties

How to bid

To place a bid on a property you will need to click the red 'Register' button below. You will be asked for your name, email address and a password. Once you have completed the form Bamboo will send you a welcome email, you will be asked 'Verify' your details within this email. Once verified you will be able to view the legal pack of any property.

For all enquiries regarding the current Online Auction properties please contact the office dealing with the property sale.
